hero.verse: "I am the gate; whoever enters through me will be saved."
hero.subtitle: A community rooted in the Gospel, reaching Namur and beyond.

about.headline: Welcome to GRC
about.p1: Gate of Redemption Church is a young, Spirit-filled church of about 40 members in Namur, Montréal. We are passionate about the Great Commission — making disciples, sharing the Gospel, and serving our community.
about.p2: We're new here, but our mission isn't. Everyone is welcome.
about.cta: New Here? We'd love to meet you →

hero.headline: Our Story
hero.subtitle: How a calling became a community in the heart of Namur.

origin.p1: Gate of Redemption Church was born out of a deep conviction that the Gospel must be lived out in community. Founded in Namur, Montréal, GRC began as a small gathering of believers who felt called to serve this neighbourhood with the love of Christ.
origin.p2: We are a young, Spirit-filled church of about 40 members — diverse in background but united in purpose. We believe the Church is not a building but a people, and that people are called to go.
origin.p3: We're still writing our story. And we'd love for you to be part of it.

timeline.event: Growing and reaching Namur and beyond

hero.headline: What We Believe
hero.subtitle: Our vision, values, and the convictions that guide everything we do.

visionValues.missionStatement: To make disciples of all nations, starting right here in Namur — through the proclamation of the Gospel, authentic community, and sacrificial service.

statementOfFaith.title: The Bible
statementOfFaith.text: We believe the Bible is the inspired, infallible Word of God and the final authority for faith and life.

statementOfFaith.title: The Trinity
statementOfFaith.text: We believe in one God eternally existing in three persons: Father, Son, and Holy Spirit.

statementOfFaith.title: Salvation
statementOfFaith.text: We believe salvation is by grace alone, through faith alone, in Christ alone — His death and resurrection is the only basis for forgiveness and eternal life.

statementOfFaith.title: The Holy Spirit
statementOfFaith.text: We believe the Holy Spirit indwells every believer and empowers the Church for witness, worship, and works of love.

statementOfFaith.title: The Church
statementOfFaith.text: We believe the Church is the body of Christ, called to make disciples, care for one another, and serve the world.

statementOfFaith.title: The Great Commission
statementOfFaith.text: We believe every follower of Jesus is called to go and make disciples — in their neighbourhood, city, and to the ends of the earth.

statementOfFaith.title: The Return of Christ
statementOfFaith.text: We believe Jesus will return personally and visibly to judge the living and the dead and to establish His kingdom forever.

visionValues.vision: We believe Namur is not a forgotten neighbourhood — it is a mission field. GRC exists to be a light in this community: serving the poor, welcoming the stranger, and pointing everyone to Jesus.

hero.headline: Meet the Team
hero.subtitle: The people who lead, serve, and build community at GRC.

members.name: Pastor Claude
members.title: Lead Pastor
members.bio: Pastor Claude leads GRC with a passion for the Gospel and a heart for the Namur community. He founded the church and is committed to raising disciples who will go and make disciples.

members.name: Pastor Stephane
members.title: Pastor
members.bio: Pastor Stephane heads our community outreach efforts, including the neighbourhood food drive. He is passionate about meeting practical needs and showing the love of Christ in tangible ways.

members.name: Pastor Antoine
members.title: Pastor
members.bio: Pastor Antoine leads our discipleship and evangelism initiatives and oversees our youth ministry. He is dedicated to equipping believers to share their faith and grow in their walk with God.

members.name: Head Deacon Elijah
members.title: Head Deacon
members.bio: Deacon Elijah serves as general overseer of the church and heads our worship team. His servant leadership keeps the congregation connected and the Sunday experience centred on God.

hero.headline: Our Ministries
hero.subtitle: Serving Namur and beyond with the love of Christ.

howToJoin.title: How to Get Involved
howToJoin.step1: Reach out via the contact form or email us
howToJoin.step2: Come meet us on a Sunday or at an outreach event
howToJoin.step3: Join a ministry that fits your heart and calling

foodDrive.tagline: Fighting hunger in Namur, one family at a time.
foodDrive.desc: Our Neighbourhood Food Drive is one of our most visible expressions of Christ's love. Every week, we collect and distribute food to families in need right here in Namur. It's simple, practical, and deeply impactful — and we need your hands.
foodDrive.whoFor: Anyone who wants to serve their community practically. No experience required — just a willing heart.
impact: Open to volunteers of all backgrounds

streetEvangelism.tagline: Taking the Gospel to the streets of our neighbourhood.
streetEvangelism.desc: Street Evangelism is at the heart of who we are. We believe the Gospel must go to where people are — not wait for them to come to us. Every Saturday, we go out into the streets of Namur to share the love and message of Jesus Christ with our neighbours.
streetEvangelism.whoFor: Anyone with a desire to share their faith. We train and equip all volunteers — you don't need to be an expert, just willing.
streetEvangelism.schedule: Saturdays, 10:00 AM — Meeting at 5275 Rue Ferrier

smallGroups.desc: Small Groups are where community is built. These intimate gatherings of 6–12 people meet regularly for Bible study, prayer, worship, and real-life conversation. They're the backbone of discipleship at GRC.
smallGroups.whoFor: Everyone — whether you're new to faith or have been walking with Jesus for years. Small groups are for anyone who wants to grow.
smallGroups.schedule: Various times — contact us to find a group near you

discipleshipMentorship.tagline: Raising the next generation of disciple-makers.
discipleshipMentorship.desc: Discipleship Mentorship pairs mature believers with newer Christians for intentional, one-on-one or small-group spiritual growth. We believe faith is caught as much as it's taught — and that every believer is called to multiply.
discipleshipMentorship.whoFor: New believers looking for guidance, and mature Christians ready to invest in others.
discipleshipMentorship.schedule: Flexible scheduling — arranged between mentor and mentee

youthMentorship.desc: Youth Mentorship is our commitment to the young people of Namur. Through relationships, activities, and the Word of God, we walk alongside young people aged 13–25 to help them build a faith that lasts — and a life of purpose.
youthMentorship.whoFor: Youth aged 13–25, and adults who feel called to pour into the next generation.
youthMentorship.schedule: Monthly gatherings + ongoing mentorship — contact us for details

hero.headline: The GRC Podcast
hero.subtitle: Conversations about faith, community, and the Gospel in Montréal.

items.title: Faith in the City: Planting in Montréal
items.description: Pastor Emmanuel shares the story behind GRC and what it means to plant a church in a secular city.

items.title: What the Great Commission Means Today
items.description: A conversation about the call to make disciples and why it matters for every believer, not just pastors.

items.title: Stories from the Streets: Evangelism in Namur
items.description: Real stories from our Saturday street evangelism team — encounters, challenges, and moments of grace.

featuredEpisode.title: Why God Asks Us to Tell Him Our Needs?
featuredEpisode.description: In this Bread of Life message, sister Dany helps us reflect on the instruction in Philippians 4:6 where believers are invited to make their needs known to God. While God already knows everything, prayer is not meant to inform Him but to draw our hearts closer to Him.

joinTeam.headline: Join a Team
joinTeam.caption: Join a team today to begin making a difference and find your purpose while serving others. We can all play a part in what God is doing no matter our age or background.

hero.headline: Join a Team
hero.subtitle: Find your place and serve alongside the GRC community.
